vision: An agentic AI operations platform that helps businesses run and scale operations through autonomous assistants.

target_audience.primary: Small business operators and founders using AI assistants to automate daily operations

phases.name: Foundation / MVP
phases.description: Deliver the minimum reliable agentic operations experience: unified workflows, core automation execution, and operational visibility for daily use.

milestones.title: Unified Operations Inbox and Task Board Live
milestones.description: Users can view and manage operational tasks and lead/customer actions in one workspace.

milestones.title: Reliable Agent Execution Baseline
milestones.description: Configured agents can execute core workflows with observable status and fallback handling.

phases.name: Enhancement
phases.description: Improve workflow quality, responsiveness, and user control with better orchestration, templates, and monitoring.

milestones.title: Reusable Workflow Templates
milestones.description: Teams can launch automation from prebuilt templates adapted to business context.

milestones.title: Execution Quality and SLA Improvements
milestones.description: Operational delays and failed actions are reduced via better retrying, alerts, and tracking.

phases.name: Scale / Growth
phases.description: Enable multi-client scaling, stronger governance, and throughput optimization for broader adoption.

milestones.title: Multi-Deployment Governance
milestones.description: Organizations can safely manage multiple client or environment deployments with clear boundaries.

milestones.title: High-Throughput Automation Operations
milestones.description: Workflows execute at higher volume with measurable performance and reduced operational friction.

phases.name: Future / Vision
phases.description: Explore advanced capabilities and ecosystem expansion for long-term differentiation.

milestones.title: Ecosystem Extension Layer
milestones.description: External developers can build and distribute custom actions and agent extensions.

features.title: Unified Operations Command Center
features.description: Create a centralized dashboard that merges inbox-driven events, lead/customer actions, and task state into a single operational view. Include filtering by workflow type, urgency, and agent ownership.
features.rationale: Primary users struggle with fragmented tools across inbox, CRM, and task management. A unified command center directly reduces context switching and improves execution consistency.
acceptance_criteria: Given connected operational data sources, when a user opens the dashboard, then inbox, lead, and task items appear in one consolidated list/board.
Users can filter and sort by status, assignee/agent, and priority within two interactions.
Users can open item details and perform at least one primary action (assign, mark done, trigger workflow) without leaving the dashboard.
user_stories: As a small business operator, I want all operational work in one place so that I can run daily operations faster.
As an operations manager, I want to triage by urgency so that high-priority items are handled first.

features.title: Lead and Customer Follow-up Automation
features.description: Provide configurable follow-up sequences for inbound leads and customer requests, including timing rules and channel-specific actions. Support AI-assisted message drafting with human approval options.
features.rationale: Slow response and manual follow-up are explicit pain points. Automating follow-ups improves throughput and consistency while preserving team control.
acceptance_criteria: Users can configure a follow-up sequence with at least three steps and conditional timing.
Given a new lead/customer event, the system schedules and executes follow-up actions automatically.
Users can approve, edit, or skip AI-generated outbound messages before send where approval mode is enabled.
user_stories: As a sales team member, I want automatic follow-up scheduling so that no lead is missed.
As a founder, I want consistent response quality so that customer trust and conversion improve.

features.title: Reliable Agent Orchestration and Fallbacks
features.description: Harden agent execution with explicit retries, timeout policies, failure states, and fallback actions. Add execution logs tied to each run for fast diagnosis.
features.rationale: Users need reliable production orchestration. Stability and predictable behavior are foundational for trust in autonomous assistants.
acceptance_criteria: Given a transient action failure, when retry policy is configured, then the run retries automatically according to policy.
Given a hard failure, then the run transitions to a clear failed state with error context and optional fallback action.
Execution logs capture start/end time, action results, and failure reason per run.
user_stories: As a business operator, I want agent workflows to recover from temporary issues so that operations continue without manual rescue.
As a developer, I want run-level diagnostics so that I can fix broken workflows quickly.

features.title: Workflow Template Library
features.description: Introduce reusable templates for common SMB operations (lead intake, support triage, renewal reminders, handoff workflows). Include per-deployment customization fields and safe defaults.
features.rationale: Template-driven setup helps small teams deploy automation faster across different contexts, supporting the multi-deployment differentiator.
acceptance_criteria: Users can create a workflow from a template and complete required configuration fields.
At least five production-ready templates are available with documentation and defaults.
Template instances can be versioned and updated without breaking existing active runs.
user_stories: As an operations manager, I want prebuilt workflows so that I can launch automation quickly.
As a deployment owner, I want client-specific configuration so that each environment matches business rules.

features.title: Operational SLA Monitoring and Alerts
features.description: Track response and execution SLAs for key workflows and trigger notifications when thresholds are breached. Surface delayed and stuck runs in a dedicated monitoring view.
features.rationale: Improved speed and consistency are core goals. SLA visibility helps teams detect bottlenecks early and protect customer-facing performance.
acceptance_criteria: Users can define SLA thresholds per workflow type.
When a run breaches SLA, notifications are sent to configured channels/users within 1 minute.
Monitoring view lists active breaches and historical SLA trend metrics.
user_stories: As an operations lead, I want SLA alerts so that I can intervene before customer impact escalates.
As a founder, I want trend reporting so that I can measure execution quality improvements over time.

features.title: Architecture and Service Boundary Documentation Hub
features.description: Publish an in-product and repository-linked documentation hub covering service boundaries, module ownership, integration contracts, and deployment topology. Include searchable runbooks for common incidents.
features.rationale: Known gaps highlight sparse documentation and unclear boundaries. This feature reduces onboarding time, implementation errors, and cross-team friction in a complex monorepo.
acceptance_criteria: Core services/apps have documented boundaries, owners, and integration points.
Developers can find architecture and runbook content through keyword search.
Documentation includes update cadence and version timestamps for critical sections.
user_stories: As a developer, I want clear service boundaries so that I can extend workflows safely.
As a team lead, I want shared runbooks so that incident response is faster and more consistent.

features.title: Multi-Deployment Configuration Governance
features.description: Add governance controls for environment/client-specific settings, secrets validation, and promotion workflows between staging and production deployments.
features.rationale: The platform’s multi-deployment architecture is a core differentiator; governance is essential to scale safely across business contexts.
acceptance_criteria: Admins can manage environment-scoped config with validation before save.
Deployment promotion requires passing configured checks and approval steps.
Audit logs capture who changed settings, what changed, and when.
user_stories: As a deployment admin, I want guardrails for configuration changes so that production risk is reduced.
As an operations director, I want auditable deployment flows so that compliance and accountability improve.

features.title: Role-Based Access and Action Guardrails
features.description: Implement role-based permissions for agent creation, workflow execution, and sensitive integrations. Add policy checks before high-risk autonomous actions are executed.
features.rationale: As adoption grows, stronger control is needed to keep teams in control while using autonomous agents in production environments.
acceptance_criteria: System supports at least three roles with distinct permissions for workflows and integrations.
Sensitive actions require policy validation and optional approval gates before execution.
Unauthorized attempts are blocked and logged with actionable error messaging.
user_stories: As a founder, I want permission controls so that only authorized users can run sensitive automations.
As an operations manager, I want guardrails so that autonomous actions stay within approved boundaries.

features.title: Workflow Performance Optimization Toolkit
features.description: Provide profiling insights and optimization recommendations for high-volume workflows, including queue tuning and action latency breakdowns.
features.rationale: Scaling throughput is a key success metric. Performance tooling helps teams sustain growth without degrading response times.
acceptance_criteria: Users can view per-workflow latency and bottleneck hotspots.
System provides at least three actionable optimization recommendations based on observed patterns.
Teams can compare pre/post optimization metrics over a configurable time window.
user_stories: As a technical operator, I want workflow profiling so that I can keep automation fast under load.
As a product owner, I want performance benchmarks so that I can plan scaling with confidence.

features.title: Developer Extension SDK and Marketplace Foundations
features.description: Launch an SDK for building custom agent actions/connectors and foundational marketplace capabilities for sharing vetted extensions across deployments.
features.rationale: An extension ecosystem can become a long-term moat, especially for teams needing tailored workflows in niche operational contexts.
acceptance_criteria: SDK docs and examples enable creation of a custom action with authentication and error handling.
Extension packages can be registered, versioned, and enabled per deployment.
Marketplace foundation includes submission review flow and trust metadata fields.
user_stories: As a developer partner, I want an SDK so that I can build custom actions for unique client needs.
As a deployment owner, I want vetted extensions so that I can add capabilities without custom core changes.
